summary: The customer wanted to return a jacket with a broken zipper and the agent provided a return label and explained the refund process. The customer was somewhat dissatisfied with the refund timeframe.
issue_detected: Jacket zipper broke after wearing it twice

improvements.suggestion: Use phrases that acknowledge the customer's frustration
improvements.example: I understand that a broken zipper can be frustrating

improvements.suggestion: Provide more detailed explanations of the refund process
improvements.example: The refund will be processed within 7-10 days after we receive the returned item

highlights: The agent provided a clear order number and return instructions
